'''âng-j-y-j''' ('''kangajyejoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:orthogonalize|orthogonalize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-j-y-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:orthogonalize|orthogonalize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âng-j-y-j
|-
! Lemma
| kangajyejoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thingajyejoko|thingajyejoko]] || [[word:jingajyejoko|jingajyejoko]] || [[word:shingajyejoko|shingajyejoko]] || [[word:kingajyejoko|kingajyejoko]]
|-

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
